classifications.phrase: inflation remains below 2 per cent over the next couple of years
inflation is expected to average between 1 and 1½ per cent over the next couple…
the unemployment rate rises to around 10 per cent later in 2020
the unemployment rate is expected to decline gradually to around 7 per cent
The Board will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards…
it is confident that inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance dominated by concerns about weak inflation and elevated unemployment, with the Board committing to maintain accommodative policy until employment recovers and inflation sustainably reaches target.
